questions.question: Which institution is associated with ‘National Broadcasting Policy’?
questions.explanation: Telecom Regulatory Authority of India (TRAI) consulted stakeholders on ‘National Broadcasting Policy’. As per TRAI, the Policy may provide a common approach for licenses, oversight, and compliances. The government is seeking to bring further parity in how digital and legacy mediums like television and OTT streaming are regulated.

questions.question: Mohammed Siraj, who was seen in the news, plays which sports?
questions.explanation: Mohammed Siraj regained his No. 1 ODI bowler in the world tag following his splendid show in the Asia Cup final against Sri Lanka. Siraj has climbed eight positions to the top of the rankings following his Asia Cup haul of ten wickets at an average of 12.20. The highlight of that performance was the spell of 6 for 21 that dismantled Sri Lanka for 50 all out in the final.

questions.question: Indian Navy recently organised its inaugural trilateral exercise with the navies of which countries?
questions.explanation: The maiden India-Indonesia-Australia Trilateral Maritime Exercise was organized this year. Indian Navy’s indigenously built warship INS Sahyadri took part in this exercise. The trilateral exercise provided an opportunity for the three maritime nations to strengthen their partnership and improve their collective capability to support a secure Indo-Pacific region. INS Sahyadri, the indigenously designed ship, participated in the exercise.

questions.question: Which city launched the ‘Swachhata Train’ initiative as part of Swachhata Pakhwada?
questions.explanation: Recently, the Ahmedabad Municipal Corporation (AMC) launched the ‘Swachhata Train’ initiative as part of Swachhata Pakhwada to promote waste management awareness and cleanliness in the city. It aimed to raise consciousness regarding the significance of cleanliness and waste management within the city.

questions.question: Which state has recently launched the ‘CM National e-Vidhan Application (NeVA)’?
questions.explanation: The state assembly of Punjab is transitioning to a paperless system with the introduction of the National e-Vidhan Application (NeVA). The application has been recently inaugurated by the Chief Minister of Punjab Bhagwant Singh Mann. A two-day conference and workshop on NeVA was held in conjunction with the launch to promote the digitization of legislative proceedings.

questions.question: Which institution has recently developed a portable device to determine the quality of water and soil?
questions.explanation: IIT-Madras has recently developed a device to determine the quality of water and soil. The device is a portable, point-of-use tool that can detect heavy metals in both soil and water. The current high-end techniques such as ‘Inductively Coupled Plasma-Optical Emission Spectroscopy’ (ICP-OES) require sophisticated labs and lengthy procedures. However, the device developed by IIT M is less complex and can be operated by anyone wanting to measure soil and water quality.

questions.question: Which country hosts the ASEAN Defence Ministers Meeting (ADMM) Plus Expert Working Group (EWG) on Counter Terrorism Field Training Exercise (FTX) 2023?
questions.explanation: The ASEAN Defence Ministers Meeting (ADMM) Plus Expert Working Group (EWG) on Counter Terrorism Field Training Exercise (FTX) 2023 is set to be hosted by Russia. India will be represented by Indian Army Contingent consisting of 32 personnel from a Battalion affiliated to the Rajputana Rifles.

questions.question: India’s first Green Hydrogen Fuel Cell Bus was launched in which state/UT?
questions.explanation: Union Minister Hardeep Singh Puri flagged off the country’s first green hydrogen fuel cell bus in Delhi. The bus is powered by renewable energy-produced Green Hydrogen. The vehicles will undertake operational trials across the national capital and NCR. The trial period, more than 3 lakh kilometres across all buses, will generate data that will serve as a national repository.

questions.question: Which country’s women’s cricket team has clinched a gold medal at the Asian Games 2023?
questions.explanation: The Indian women’s cricket team, led by captain Harmanpreet Kaur, recently clinched the gold medal at the Asian Games 2023 in Hangzhou, China. In their debut appearance at the Asian Games, the Indian women’s cricket team secured a gold medal, defeating Sri Lanka.

questions.question: India and which country is set to kick-start a two-week war game in Alaska?
questions.explanation: The Indian and US armies will kick-start a two-week war game in Alaska that will feature a number of complex drills. The mega exercise comes amid a renewed push by both New Delhi and Washington to expand the overall scope of the India-US global strategic partnership.
